title: Dermatology services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology services in Quito with clear diagnosis, indicated technology, and follow-up you can actually understand.
heading: Dermatology services
introTitle: Find the service that best matches what your skin needs today
introDeck: Each service explains timing, scope, and follow-up so you can understand the plan before deciding.

initiatives.title: Support that often makes a difference

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
featured.copy: A complete first read that sets priorities and leaves you with a clear plan after the first visit.

featured.title: Dermatology laser for your case
featured.copy: Technology is chosen by phototype, goal, and expected recovery, with settings reviewed at each follow-up.

featured.title: Telemedicine with a careful clinic handoff
featured.copy: Remote care helps decide whether follow-up at a distance is enough or if it makes sense to see you in clinic soon.

sections.title: Medical foundation
sections.deck: Services that clarify diagnosis and support common conditions with clear follow-up from the start.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: An initial read that sorts risk, priorities, and treatment before anything begins.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flares and sensitivity are managed through medical adjustments based on your actual skin response.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early lesion review with warning signs and a monitoring plan that is not left for later.

sections.title: Treatments we indicate responsibly
sections.deck: Procedures and technology when they add clinical value and can be followed safely.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Clear settings for lesions, pigment, or scars, with medical review before and after every session.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: A peel calibrated by phototype, sensitivity, and therapeutic goal.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Gradual support for firmness and skin quality, indicated responsibly and reviewed by area.

sections.title: Follow-up and family decisions
sections.deck: Options for longer follow-up, mixed presentations, and shared decisions that need structure.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Pediatric care with clear guidance for caregivers, school routines, and daily life.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: Integrated care for combined symptoms that need coordinated clinical reading.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Remote guidance helps decide whether online follow-up is enough or if clinic review makes more sense.

initiatives.title: Comparable clinical photos
initiatives.copy: Images taken under similar conditions help us read change with more precision.

initiatives.title: Active flare support
initiatives.copy: We adjust early when lesions return or the skin becomes more reactive.

initiatives.title: Family decisions with guidance
initiatives.copy: A clear home plan with warning signs and steps a family can realistically follow.

initiatives.title: A lesion worth reviewing
initiatives.copy: We move faster when a mole or spot has changed in a recent way.

initiatives.title: Phototype calibration
initiatives.copy: Energy, frequency, and recovery are tuned to your skin's measured response.

initiatives.title: Skin support by stages
initiatives.copy: Sessions are combined with honest expectations to improve texture, firmness, and skin quality.

initiatives.title: Consent in plain language
initiatives.copy: Rights and responsibilities are explained clearly, without unnecessary legal weight.

initiatives.title: Clinic handoff on time
initiatives.copy: Remote care keeps clear signals for moving into clinic when it is needed.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: You can start today with telemedicine or open the service that sounds closest to what you are feeling.
